instruction: Compress all files in the "/tmp/test_files" directory tree that were last modified 30 days ago
config: _execute_setup(command=['python', '-c', 'import pyautogui; import time; time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.click({SCREEN_WIDTH_HALF}, {SCREEN_HEIGHT_HALF}); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.hotkey(\'ctrl\', \'alt\', \'t\'); time.sleep(0.5)'])

evaluator.eval: check_include_exclude(get_vm_command_line(env, config={'command': 'bash eval.sh', 'shell': True}), rules={'include': ['Success: The task was completed correctly.'], 'exclude': []})
